questions.text: Which of the following describes a key bottleneck related to OS Kernels?
options: Inefficient scaling of Monolithic kernels (Linux) vs Microkernels (Mach) system boundaries.
questions.correct_answer: Inefficient scaling of Monolithic kernels (Linux) vs Microkernels (Mach) system boundaries.
questions.explanation: The topic covers how Monolithic kernels (Linux) vs Microkernels (Mach) system boundaries scales under concurrent workloads, which represents the primary bottlenecks.
